_note: Values are MAD = -ln(MAUVE) per Huang et al. 2025; lower = closer to SDD-706.
_protocol: mauve.compute_mauve(num_buckets='auto', seed=42, featurize_model_name=None) on 1024-d MERT-v1-330M time-mean embeddings. num_buckets='auto' resolves to 10 for n=100, so equivalent to num_buckets=10 explicitly.
